caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses speaks against a solid dark gray background. She wears a light green, patterned tunic with a V-neckline and a simple black necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her tunic. In the lower-left and lower-center areas of the scene, a circular gold and red logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains centered in a medium shot, gesturing slightly with her head and shifting her facial expressions as she speaks. Her mouth opens and closes in a speaking motion, and her gaze remains directed toward the camera. The setting and her attire remain consistent, with only minor changes in her posture and facial movements as the video progresses.
